message:
fix: add git fallback for SHA in feedback issues (#11101)

vcsRevision() only read from debug.ReadBuildInfo(), which is empty
when running via go run or local builds without VCS stamping. Add
the same git rev-parse HEAD fallback used by the /api/version
endpoint so the SHA appears in feedback-created issues regardless
of how the binary was built.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
